subject: Shinx, a small blue lion cub Pokémon in a bright grassy outdoor setting
description: A small blue lion cub creature sits in a grassy sunlit scene, wide eyes alert and curious. Its body is compact with a rounded head, small paws, and a star-tipped tail. The background is bright with green grass and light, giving an energetic cheerful quality. The expression reads as alert and slightly startled.
